text.title: openai-embeddings Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for openai-embeddings as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Embedding sensitive PII (names, emails, IDs) into a shared vector store.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Data leaks via nearest-neighbor queries are a real attack surface — an adversary can extract PII by querying with known PII fragments and retrieving neighbors.
